evidence_excerpt: Ultimately, she improved back to her motor baseline and only mild residual speech deficits... Three-month follow-up MRI demonstrated recanalisation of the occluded DVA.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Ongoing mild residual speech deficits noted after clinical improvement; no further complications reported.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: She was treated acutely with propofol... able to be weaned off of the propofol, until she was extubated.
Ultimately, she improved back to her motor baseline and only mild residual speech deficits, and was discharged home after extensive physical therapy.
Three-month follow-up MRI demonstrated recanalisation of the occluded DVA.

notes_on_uncertainty: Long-term outcomes beyond approximately 3 months are not described. Persistence of seizures and duration of antiepileptic therapy after discharge are not reported. Index time approximated to the angiographic diagnosis and initiation of supportive/antiepileptic management during the presenting admission.
